---
title: "Workshops & Events"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    css: community.css
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<div class="community-opening" style="padding-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <p class="opening-eyebrow">WORKSHOPS & EVENTS</p>
  <h1 class="opening-title">Learn together.<br/>Build together.</h1>
  <p class="opening-body">From annual research workshops at ICTP in Trieste to monthly student showcases on Zoom — the ML Systems community gathers regularly to teach, learn, and share.</p>
</div>
```

## Upcoming Events {#upcoming}

```{=html}
<div class="event-cards">

  <div class="event-card event-card-featured">
    <div class="event-card-badge">Workshop</div>
    <div class="event-card-date">
      <span class="event-month">Jun</span>
      <span class="event-day">2026</span>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card-body">
      <h3>SciTinyML 2026</h3>
      <p class="event-location"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> ICTP, Trieste, Italy</p>
      <p>Scientific applications of ML on low-power devices — hands-on labs, research talks, and student presentations.</p>
      <a href="https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/SciTinyML" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="event-link">Learn more <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card">
    <div class="event-card-badge event-badge-workshop">Workshop</div>
    <div class="event-card-date">
      <span class="event-month">Nov</span>
      <span class="event-day">2025</span>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card-body">
      <h3>WALC 2025 Applied AI Workshop</h3>
      <p class="event-location"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> Latin America (TBD)</p>
      <p>Applied AI workshop as part of the Latin American and Caribbean Networking Conference.</p>
      <a href="https://walc2025-appliedai.notion.site/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="event-link">Learn more <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card event-card-recurring">
    <div class="event-card-badge event-badge-monthly">Monthly</div>
    <div class="event-card-date">
      <span class="event-month"><i class="fas fa-redo"></i></span>
      <span class="event-day">Monthly</span>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card-body">
      <h3>TinyML4D Show & Tell</h3>
      <p class="event-location"><i class="fas fa-video"></i> Virtual (Zoom)</p>
      <p>Students and researchers from 20+ countries present TinyML projects — classroom work, research, and lessons from failures. All skill levels welcome.</p>
      <a href="https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/showAndTell" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="event-link">Submit a talk <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Recurring Series {#series}

Three recurring programs form the backbone of the community's learning calendar.

```{=html}
<div class="series-grid">

  <div class="series-card">
    <div class="series-icon"><i class="fas fa-flask"></i></div>
    <h3>SciTinyML Workshop Series</h3>
    <p class="series-cadence"><i class="fas fa-calendar-alt"></i> Annual (typically May–June)</p>
    <p>The annual SciTinyML workshop at ICTP in Trieste brings together researchers and students to apply machine learning to scientific challenges on low-power devices — from environmental monitoring to health diagnostics. Each edition combines foundational TinyML labs with cutting-edge research talks.</p>
    <div class="series-links">
      <a href="https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/SciTinyML" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i> Website</a>
      <a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLL5nb-tgetJhpCtybAI7Epkiy_fUiIhwm" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="fab fa-youtube"></i> Recordings</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="series-card">
    <div class="series-icon"><i class="fas fa-chalkboard-teacher"></i></div>
    <h3>TinyML4D Show & Tell</h3>
    <p class="series-cadence"><i class="fas fa-calendar-alt"></i> Monthly (last Thursday)</p>
    <p>A monthly virtual session where students from 20+ countries share TinyML projects — agriculture, healthcare, environmental monitoring, assistive technology. Past recordings cover projects from across Africa, Asia, and Latin America.</p>
    <div class="series-links">
      <a href="https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/showAndTell" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i> Submit a Talk</a>
      <a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLL5nb-tgetJhpCtybAI7Epkiy_fUiIhwm" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="fab fa-youtube"></i> Recordings</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="series-card">
    <div class="series-icon"><i class="fas fa-microphone-alt"></i></div>
    <h3>TinyML4D Seminar Series</h3>
    <p class="series-cadence"><i class="fas fa-calendar-alt"></i> Periodic</p>
    <p>Research seminars featuring domain-specific applications of TinyML at institutions across the developing world — from getting started with Arduino kits to advanced on-device learning techniques.</p>
    <div class="series-links">
      <a href="https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLL5nb-tgetJiPg33y__aHO8oms1bZKnvD" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="fab fa-youtube"></i> Recordings</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Free Online Courses {#courses}

The curriculum extends beyond the textbook through free online courses on edX and Coursera.

```{=html}
<div class="course-grid">

  <a href="https://www.edx.org/course/fundamentals-of-tinyml" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="course-card">
    <div class="course-platform"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i> edX</div>
    <h3>Foundations of TinyML</h3>
    <p>The basics of machine learning and embedded systems — your first introduction to the language of TinyML.</p>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.edx.org/course/applications-of-tinyml" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="course-card">
    <div class="course-platform"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i> edX</div>
    <h3>Applications of TinyML</h3>
    <p>Practical examples: keyword spotting, visual wake words, and gesture recognition on real devices.</p>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.edx.org/course/deploying-tinyml" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="course-card">
    <div class="course-platform"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i> edX</div>
    <h3>Deploying TinyML</h3>
    <p>TensorFlow Lite programming for microcontrollers — from model conversion to on-device inference.</p>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.edx.org/course/mlops-for-scaling-tinyml" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="course-card">
    <div class="course-platform"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i> edX</div>
    <h3>MLOps for Scaling TinyML</h3>
    <p>Machine Learning Operations through the lens of TinyML — production deployment at the edge.</p>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.coursera.org/learn/introduction-to-embedded-machine-learning" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="course-card">
    <div class="course-platform"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i> Coursera</div>
    <h3>Intro to Embedded ML</h3>
    <p>Neural network training and deployment using the Edge Impulse platform.</p>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.coursera.org/learn/computer-vision-with-embedded-machine-learning" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="course-card">
    <div class="course-platform"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i> Coursera</div>
    <h3>Computer Vision with Embedded ML</h3>
    <p>Image classification and object detection using deep learning on edge devices.</p>
  </a>

</div>
```

## Past Events {#past}

```{=html}
<div class="past-events-section">
  <p class="past-events-intro">A growing archive of workshops across three continents — from ICTP in Trieste to UNIFEI in Brazil to classrooms in Malawi.</p>

  <div class="past-events-timeline">

    <div class="past-year-group">
      <h3 class="past-year">2025</h3>
      <div class="past-event-list">
        <a href="https://tinymlcolombia.notion.site/SciTinyML-2025-Scientific-Use-of-Machine-Learning-on-Low-Power-Devices-2736dbff8adb806c8bd0d1b79f57cf5d" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">SciTinyML 2025 — Colombia</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">Colombia</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://tinymlmalawi.notion.site/Agenda-TinyML-workshop-Malawi-1bd6dbff8adb800c9271db78657a8ad0" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">Workshop on TinyML for Sustainable Development</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">Malawi</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="past-year-group">
      <h3 class="past-year">2024</h3>
      <div class="past-event-list">
        <a href="https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/SciTinyML-24/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">SciTinyML 2024</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">ICTP (Remote)</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/SustainableDev-24/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">TinyML for Sustainable Development</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">UNIFEI, Brazil</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://github.com/marcozennaro/ICTP-UNU-TinyML/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">ICTP-UNU Workshop on TinyML</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">Macau</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="past-year-group">
      <h3 class="past-year">2023</h3>
      <div class="past-event-list">
        <a href="https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/SciTinyML-23/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">SciTinyML 2023</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">ICTP, Trieste, Italy</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://summerschool.morocco.ai" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">Morocco AI Summer School 2023</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">Morocco</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/EdgeMLUP-23/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">EdgeMLUP 2023</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">Virtual</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="past-year-group">
      <h3 class="past-year">2021–2022</h3>
      <div class="past-event-list">
        <div class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">SciTinyML 2022</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">ICTP (Virtual)</span>
        </div>
        <div class="past-event-item">
          <span class="past-event-name">SciTinyML 2021</span>
          <span class="past-event-location">ICTP (Virtual)</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

## Watch & Learn {#watch}

Hundreds of hours of free video content from workshops, seminars, and student presentations.

```{=html}
<div class="video-grid">
  <a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLL5nb-tgetJhpCtybAI7Epkiy_fUiIhwm" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="video-card">
    <div class="video-icon"><i class="fab fa-youtube"></i></div>
    <h3>SciTinyML & Show & Tell</h3>
    <p>Workshop talks and monthly student project presentations from around the world.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLL5nb-tgetJiPg33y__aHO8oms1bZKnvD" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="video-card">
    <div class="video-icon"><i class="fab fa-youtube"></i></div>
    <h3>TinyML4D Seminars</h3>
    <p>Research talks on domain-specific TinyML applications from institutions worldwide.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="https://discuss.tinymlx.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="video-card">
    <div class="video-icon"><i class="fas fa-comments"></i></div>
    <h3>Discussion Forum</h3>
    <p>Ask questions, share projects, and connect with the TinyML education community.</p>
  </a>
</div>
```

:::
